case_title: CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A. VS. MICHAEL CARAVANTES et al

docket_entries.description: NON SERVICE REPORT; UNABLE TO SERVE THE DEFT THE SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A.
POS OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT DUE DILIGENCE UNABLE TO SERVE MICHAEL J CARAVANTES FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT CARAVANTES, MICHAEL DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-25-2012
